template_data.sub: The 2–3 year wait isn't a product problem. It's a pipeline problem.
template_data.image_headline: YOUR ROI DELAY IS A PIPELINE PROBLEM
template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'THE MYTH' with red X icon. Three short myth labels (2-3 words each): 'WAIT FOR AWARDS', '2–3 YEAR ROI', 'SCHEDULE DOES WORK'. Right panel white/light, bold label 'THE REALITY' with green checkmarks. Three short reality labels: 'BUILD PIPELINE FIRST', 'YEAR-ONE AWARDS', 'YOU DO THE WORK'. Center: illustrated professional man in business casual walking confidently from dark side to light side. Bold headline top: 'YOUR ROI DELAY IS A PIPELINE PROBLEM'. Bottom dark navy banner with short callout: 'PIPELINE → ROI'. Footer text: 'Jason · GSA Focus'.
